answers.conceptUnderstanding: Gravity is the force that pulls objects toward Earth or another planet. It makes things fall down instead of floating.
answers.pastExperiences: When I drop my water bottle, it falls to the floor. That is gravity pulling it down.

answers.conceptUnderstanding: Gravity is a pull between objects with mass that brings them together.
answers.pastExperiences: A basketball comes back down after you shoot it.

answers.conceptUnderstanding: Gravity is like a magnet that pulls things down to Earth.
answers.pastExperiences: If I jump, I always come back down.

answers.conceptUnderstanding: Gravity is a force between masses that causes attraction.
answers.pastExperiences: Rain falls from clouds to the ground.

answers.conceptUnderstanding: Gravity is what makes objects fall and keeps planets in orbit.
answers.pastExperiences: My phone falls off the couch if it is near the edge.

answers.conceptUnderstanding: Gravity is the force pulling objects toward each other.
answers.pastExperiences: When I ride a bike downhill, I speed up because of gravity.

answers.conceptUnderstanding: Gravity pulls things down so they do not float away.
answers.pastExperiences: A ball rolls back down a hill.

answers.conceptUnderstanding: Gravity is a force of attraction between masses like Earth and you.
answers.pastExperiences: Throwing a ball up and it comes down.

answers.conceptUnderstanding: Gravity is a pulling force that makes objects fall.
answers.pastExperiences: Rain falls from the sky to the ground.

answers.conceptUnderstanding: Gravity is a force that attracts objects to each other.
answers.pastExperiences: When I drop my keys they fall to the ground.

answers.conceptUnderstanding: Gravity keeps us on the ground and makes things fall.
answers.pastExperiences: A swing moves back down after being pushed.

answers.conceptUnderstanding: Gravity is the pull from Earth that causes acceleration downward.
answers.pastExperiences: A pencil falls off the desk.

answers.conceptUnderstanding: Gravity is a force that pulls everything down.
answers.pastExperiences: Snow falls from the sky.

answers.conceptUnderstanding: Gravity is an attractive force between objects.
answers.pastExperiences: Jumping on a trampoline and coming back down.

answers.conceptUnderstanding: Gravity is the force that pulls objects down to Earth.
answers.pastExperiences: A soccer ball falls after you kick it up.

answers.conceptUnderstanding: Gravity is a force that attracts objects to each other.
answers.pastExperiences: A roller coaster goes down because of gravity.

answers.conceptUnderstanding: Gravity keeps us grounded and pulls objects down.
answers.pastExperiences: Dropping a pen and it falls.

answers.conceptUnderstanding: Gravity is a force that pulls objects toward a planet.
answers.pastExperiences: If I toss a coin, it comes back down.

answers.conceptUnderstanding: Gravity is the force that makes objects fall toward Earth.
answers.pastExperiences: Water falls out of a cup if you tip it over.

answers.conceptUnderstanding: Gravity is an attractive force between objects with mass.
answers.pastExperiences: A book falls off a table.
